name: Sineng Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sineng Electric Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and marketing of power and electronic products. The company provides power and electronic products, and solutions including grid-connected photovoltaic (PV) inverters; operation and maintenance of PV power plants; and development of PV power plant, power quality control, energy storage bidirectional converter, and energy automobiles charging. Its products include PV solutions, including utility PV, hilly terrain PV, water front PV, commercial PV, and residential PV solutions; power filters comprising active power filters, static Var generators, and smart power quality correction productions; and DC and AC energy storage products. The company offers solutions in power and related industries comprising power generation, power supply, and power distribution system. Sineng Electric Co.,Ltd. is based in Wuxi, China.
